description:
**Figure Title:** Architecture of a Robust RAG Pipeline for Information Retrieval and Generation

**Overall Layout:**
The diagram follows a clear left-to-right flow, structured into two primary, horizontally stacked logical pipelines: the "Indexing Pipeline" at the top and the "Query-time Pipeline" below it. An "Evaluation Panel" is positioned to the right of both pipelines, indicating a monitoring or feedback loop. The entire diagram is set against a pristine white background, maintaining a clean academic aesthetic.

**Components:**

**A. Indexing Pipeline (Top Section):**
This section is visually grouped within a large, subtly filled rounded rectangle with a gentle wash of soft mint green. Its border is a fine, solid line in soft charcoal gray.
